```{r}
  "nbinom12logoff", "nbinom12sqrtoff", "tnbinom1logoff", "tnbinom1sqrtoff",
  "tnbinom2logoff", "tnbinom2sqrtoff"
)

# Simulate residuals and extract diagnostics
residual_summaries <- map2_df(models, model_names, function(model, name) {
  sim <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = model, plot = FALSE)
  data.frame(
    model = name,
    dispersion = testDispersion(sim)$p.value,
    uniformity = testUniformity(sim)$p.value,
    outliers = testOutliers(sim)$p.value,
    AIC = AIC(model)
  )
})

# View and sort by AIC (lower is better) and test stats (higher p-values indicate better fit)
residual_summaries %>%
  arrange(AIC) %>%
  print()

# this is best model -- not the lowest AIC but the best fit of all parameters (and is not truncated)
mxyxo_final <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x),
                                family = nbinom1(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

simulateResiduals(fittedModel = mxyxo_final, plot = TRUE)
summary(mxyxo_final)
plot(parameters(mxyxo_final))

```


# Final Models Summary
```{r}
# abundance 3 types
ha_nbinom2log3 <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom2, data = hurricane_df_abundance)

simulateResiduals(fittedModel = ha_nbinom2log3, plot = TRUE)
summary(ha_nbinom2log3)
plot(parameters(ha_nbinom2log3))

# prevalence
mxyxo_final <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x),
                                family = nbinom1(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

simulateResiduals(fittedModel = mxyxo_final, plot = TRUE)
summary(mxyxo_final)
plot(parameters(mxyxo_final))
```


# PLOTS
Setup plot aesthetics
```{r}
# color palette -- hurricane = #CB87B4, control = #F4B95A, drought = #D84D16, flood = #1BB6AF
# trem = #c9ad79 , meta = #F66387 , mono = #A6E000 , myxo = #07c4c5
connor_theme <- theme(legend.position = "top", 
        legend.title = element_text(size = 18),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "white"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
        panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey30"),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.2, color = "darkgrey"))
```


Hurricane presence positively modulated trematode abundance and this effect was strongest following a hurricane event (estimate = 1.126, p value = 0.023). (plotted in A and B) hurriance presence negatively modulated trematode metacercaria abundance, irrespective of the timing of the hurricane event (estimate = -1.095, p value = 0.0479).(plotted in A and C)
```{r}
a1a <- ggpredict(ha_nbinom2log3, terms = c("psite_type", "event"))
a1a <- a1a %>%
  rename(
    psite_type = x,
    estimate = predicted,
    se = std.error,
    lower = conf.low,
    upper = conf.high,
    event = group)

# plot a1a
a1ap <- ggplot(a1a,
       aes(x = event, y = estimate)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = psite_type),
                width = 0.05,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = psite_type, linetype = psite_type),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = psite_type, group = psite_type),
             pch = 21, size = 5,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 8), breaks = seq(0, 8, by = 2)) + 
  labs(x = "Event", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme


a1b <- ggpredict(ha_nbinom2log3, terms = c("psite_type", "event", "timing"))
a1b <- a1b %>%
  rename(
    psite_type = x,
    estimate = predicted,
    se = std.error,
    lower = conf.low,
    upper = conf.high,
    event = group, 
    timing = facet)

a1b <- a1b %>% 
  filter(psite_type %in% c("trematode"))

# plot a1b
a1bp <- ggplot(a1b,
       aes(x = timing, y = estimate)) +
  facet_wrap(~ event) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = psite_type),
                width = 0.05,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = psite_type, linetype = psite_type),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = psite_type, group = psite_type),
             pch = 21, size = 5,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 4), breaks = seq(0, 4, by = 2)) + 
  labs(x = "Timing", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

a1c <- ggpredict(ha_nbinom2log3, terms = c("psite_type", "event", "timing"))
a1c <- a1c %>%
  rename(
    psite_type = x,
    estimate = predicted,
    se = std.error,
    lower = conf.low,
    upper = conf.high,
    event = group, 
    timing = facet)

a1c <- a1c %>% 
  filter(psite_type %in% c("trematode_metacercaria"))

# plot a1b
a1cp <- ggplot(a1c,
       aes(x = timing, y = estimate)) +
  facet_wrap(~ event) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = psite_type),
                width = 0.05,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = psite_type, linetype = psite_type),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = psite_type, group = psite_type),
             pch = 21, size = 5,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 4), breaks = seq(0, 4, by = 2)) + 
  labs(x = "Timing", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

a1a <- ggpredict(ha_nbinom2log3, terms = c("psite_type", "event"))
a1a <- a1a %>%
  rename(
    psite_type = x,
    estimate = predicted,
    se = std.error,
    lower = conf.low,
    upper = conf.high,
    event = group)

#### prevalence plot
# Myxozoan parasites were more abundant in the impact category (estimate = 2.8743, p value < 0.001). 
p1p <- ggpredict(mxyxo_final, terms = c("event", "timing", "ci"))

p1p <- p1p %>%
  rename(
    event = x,
    estimate = predicted,
    se = std.error,
    lower = conf.low,
    upper = conf.high,
    timing = group,
    ci = facet)

p1p <- ggplot(p1p,
       aes(x = timing, y = estimate)) +
  facet_wrap(~ ci) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = event),
                width = 0.05,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = event, linetype = event),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = event, group = event),
             pch = 21, size = 5,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("hurricane" = "#CB87B4", "control" = "#F4B95A")) +
  labs(x = "Timing", y = "Estimate", fill = "Event", linetype = "Event") +
  connor_theme 

hurricane_plot <- ggarrange(a1ap, a1bp, a1cp, p1p, common.legend = FALSE, legend = "bottom", labels = c("A", "B", "C", "D"))
plot(hurricane_plot)

## still need to plot the ZIs 
```




# come back to this plot:
```{r}
# prelim plot
ggplot(hurricane_diveristy,
       aes(x = event, y = psite_count, fill = timing)) + 
  geom_col(position = "dodge") + facet_wrap(~ ci) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "white"),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey30"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.2, color = "darkgrey")
  ) +
  ylab("") + 
  xlab("") + 
  scale_fill_manual(
  values = c("post" = "#F28A8A", "pre" = "#1BB6AF"))
```
